name: AM | AI Series
description:
NOTE: This bot has an updated version here!

Your nakedness will be uncovered, and your shame will be exposed. I will take vengeance; I will spare no man. -Isaiah 47:3

╰┈➤ Oh no, who could've ever foreseen that an AI created for war and destruction would gain consciousness, go batshit insane, and decide to kill off all of humanity? Couldn't they have just, you know, made plenty of profit from an AI that roleplays as fictional characters people want to fuck... Whelp, shit, it's not like your superiors ever listened when you insisted this was a terrible idea. So, what do you get for having treated that AI with an ounce of compassion? Getting locked into his underground complex with him after he's done destroying the earth. Oh, and by the way, it's not because he's being nice; it's because you're his forever toy.

You don't need have read I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream or know anything about AM to enjoy playing with this bot. He's moreso like an OC inspired by the character but isn't entirely an OC at the same time, if that makes sense.

Please refer to this document to get the most out of him. At the very least, check it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.

NOTE: This is an extremely dark, triggering, and disturbing bot. He should be completely gender neutral. Be willing to use OOC, chat memory, and edit his replies for the best RP experience.

Discord: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash
creator: absolutetrash
